hero.title: Your Website. Done. In 7 Days.
hero.subtitle: No agency prices. No technical effort. No upfront risk. Professional website including hosting, updates and support — cancellable monthly after 12 months.
hero.bar1: 7 days until your website is ready

about.title: Why You Don't Have a Website Yet
about.pain1_desc: Agencies charge CHF 5,000–15,000 upfront. A huge risk — especially when you're still growing.
about.pain2_desc: DIY builders seem simple but cost hours. And the result still looks unprofessional.
about.pain3_desc: You run a business. Who should handle texts, images, hosting and tech?
about.pain4_desc: You've had bad experiences. Lots promised, little delivered.

features.title: Our Advantages
features.feature1_desc: Your website goes live in just 7 days — no waiting, no delays.
features.feature2_desc: One flat monthly fee — hosting, updates and support included.
features.feature3_desc: Built and managed by a dedicated Swiss team with personal support.
features.feature4_desc: No upfront costs. Cancellable monthly. You stay in full control.

contact.title: Book Your Free Consultation
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We will get back to you within 24 hours and put together a tailored offer for you.
